name: business-sales
description: Net-new sales prospecting and qualification skills: 5-dimension prospect analysis, BANT/MEDDIC lead scoring, buying-committee mapping, and full Ideal Customer Profile construction. OSINT-only, ToS-respecting, with compliance-gated outreach drafts. Enriches the existing Sales operator role (no net-new persona).
author: Wayland Business Pack

skills.name: sales-prospect
skills.description: Run a 5-dimension prospect analysis on any company URL using OSINT only: company research, BANT/MEDDIC opportunity qualification, decision-maker mapping, competitive positioning, and ICP-fit + outreach strategy fanned in parallel via delegate_task, aggregated into a weighted Prospect Score and a compliance-gated first email.

skills.name: sales-qualify
skills.description: Qualify a sales lead with BANT (Budget/Authority/Need/Timeline) and MEDDIC against public signals using OSINT only, producing an Opportunity Quality Score (0-100) and a Lead Grade (A/B/C/D) with named evidence and gaps.

skills.name: sales-contacts
skills.description: Map the buying committee for a target company using OSINT only: classify contacts by buying role (Economic Buyer, Champion, Technical Evaluator, End User, Blocker, Coach), surface public personalization anchors per contact, and lay out a multi-threading sequence (no impersonation, no fabricated connections).

skills.name: sales-icp
skills.description: Build a comprehensive B2B Ideal Customer Profile across firmographic, technographic, behavioral, pain-point, budget, and channel dimensions, plus a negative ICP, a 100-point scoring rubric, buyer personas, a prospecting playbook, and a jurisdiction-gated first-outreach draft. Runs standalone or as the ICP-fit subagent under sales-prospect.
